'''√dh-?-m''' ('''dhüm''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:shine, burn|shine, burn]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-?-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:shine, burn|shine, burn]]
|-
! Citation form
| √dh-?-m
|-
! Lemma
| dhüm
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dha?amithi|dha?amithi]] || [[word:dha?amiji|dha?amiji]] || [[word:dha?amishi|dha?amishi]] || [[word:dha?ami|dha?ami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dha?amuthuth|dha?amuthuth]] || [[word:dha?amujuj|dha?amujuj]] || [[word:dha?amushush|dha?amushush]] || [[word:dha?am|dha?am]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dha?amuthu|dha?amuthu]] || [[word:dha?amuju|dha?amuju]] || [[word:dha?amushu|dha?amushu]] || [[word:dha?amu|dha?amu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dha?amufuth|dha?amufuth]] || [[word:dha?amufuj|dha?amufuj]] || [[word:dha?amufush|dha?amufush]] || [[word:dha?amuf|dha?amuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dha?amethe|dha?amethe]] || [[word:dha?ameje|dha?ameje]] || [[word:dha?ameshe|dha?ameshe]] || [[word:dha?ame|dha?ame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dha?amothoth|dha?amothoth]] || [[word:dha?amojoj|dha?amojoj]] || [[word:dha?amoshosh|dha?amoshosh]] || [[word:dha?am|dha?am]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dha?amotho|dha?amotho]] || [[word:dha?amojo|dha?amojo]] || [[word:dha?amosho|dha?amosho]] || [[word:dha?amo|dha?amo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dha?amofoth|dha?amofoth]] || [[word:dha?amofoj|dha?amofoj]] || [[word:dha?amofosh|dha?amofosh]] || [[word:dha?amof|dha?amof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dha?amæthæ|dha?amæthæ]] || [[word:dha?amæjæ|dha?amæjæ]] || [[word:dha?amæshæ|dha?amæshæ]] || [[word:dha?amæ|dha?amæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dha?amathath|dha?amathath]] || [[word:dha?amajaj|dha?amajaj]] || [[word:dha?amashash|dha?amashash]] || [[word:dha?am|dha?am]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dha?amatha|dha?amatha]] || [[word:dha?amaja|dha?amaja]] || [[word:dha?amasha|dha?amasha]] || [[word:dha?ama|dha?ama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dha?amafath|dha?amafath]] || [[word:dha?amafaj|dha?amafaj]] || [[word:dha?amafash|dha?amafash]] || [[word:dha?amaf|dha?amaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dha?amasha|dha?amasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godha?amasha|godha?amasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidha?amasha|gokidha?amasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dha?amnüsha|dha?amnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godha?amnknüsha|godha?amnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidha?amnüsha|gokidha?amnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dha?amshësha|dha?amshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godha?amnkshësha|godha?amnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidha?amshësha|gokidha?amshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dha?amrosha|dha?amrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godha?amnkrosha|godha?amnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidha?amrosha|gokidha?amrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dha?amusha|dha?amusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godha?amnkmusha|godha?amnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidha?amusha|gokidha?amusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dha?amsherasha|dha?amsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godha?amnksherasha|godha?amnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidha?amsherasha|gokidha?amsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dha?amngasha|dha?amngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godha?amnkngasha|godha?amnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidha?amngasha|gokidha?amngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dha?amyasha|dha?amyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godha?amnkyasha|godha?amnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidha?amyasha|gokidha?amyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dha?amyamasha|dha?amyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godha?amnkyamasha|godha?amnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidha?amyamasha|gokidha?amyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dha?amnüshësha|dha?amnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godha?amnknüshësha|godha?amnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidha?amnüshësha|gokidha?amnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dha?amnürosha|dha?amnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godha?amnknürosha|godha?amnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidha?amnürosha|gokidha?amnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dha?amnümusha|dha?amnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godha?amnknümusha|godha?amnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidha?amnümusha|gokidha?amnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dha?amshënüsha|dha?amshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godha?amnkshënüsha|godha?amnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidha?amshënüsha|gokidha?amshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dha?amshërosha|dha?amshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godha?amnkshërosha|godha?amnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidha?amshërosha|gokidha?amshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dha?amshëmusha|dha?amshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godha?amnkshëmusha|godha?amnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidha?amshëmusha|gokidha?amshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dha?amronüsha|dha?amronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godha?amnkronüsha|godha?amnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidha?amronüsha|gokidha?amronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dha?amroshësha|dha?amroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godha?amnkroshësha|godha?amnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidha?amroshësha|gokidha?amroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dha?amromusha|dha?amromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godha?amnkromusha|godha?amnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidha?amromusha|gokidha?amromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dha?amunüsha|dha?amunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godha?amnkmunüsha|godha?amnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidha?amunüsha|gokidha?amunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dha?amushësha|dha?amushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godha?amnkmushësha|godha?amnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidha?amushësha|gokidha?amushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dha?amurosha|dha?amurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godha?amnkmurosha|godha?amnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidha?amurosha|gokidha?amurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dha?am|dha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dhæ?æm|dhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodha?am|hodha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodhæ?æm|hodhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodha?am|hohodha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhæ?æm|hohodhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüdha?am|nüdha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüdhæ?æm|nüdhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüdha?am|nünüdha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüdhæ?æm|nünüdhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïdha?am|nïdha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïdhæ?æm|nïdhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïdha?am|nïnïdha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïdhæ?æm|nïnïdhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludha?am|ludha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludhæ?æm|ludhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludha?am|luludha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhæ?æm|luludhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidha?am|lidha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidhæ?æm|lidhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidha?am|lilidha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhæ?æm|lilidhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodha?am|kodha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodhæ?æm|kodhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodha?am|kokodha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhæ?æm|kokodhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedha?am|kedha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedhæ?æm|kedhæ?æm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedha?am|kekedha?am]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhæ?æm|kekedhæ?æm]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
